name: Still Waters
description: A quiet backwater where the reeds part over deep, dark water. Fish rise to snap at the surface — a good spot to cast a line.

discovery.message: The water here is deep and still, dimpled with rising fish.

bank.text: The water is deep and slow. Fish are rising — but you'll need a rod to reach them.

fish-check.text: You cast out and wait for a bite.
fish-check.success_text: The line goes taut — you've hooked something.
fish-check.failure_text: The float bobs and stills. Nothing takes the hook. You recast.

leave.text: You reel in, break down the rod, and move on.
